title: Classic Improvements ADD-ON 2 Stone CTM
description: A add-on for Classic Improvements that adds Connected textures!
body:
# Classic Improvements Add-on 2 (STONE CTM)
## If your looking for Classic Improvements [Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classicimprovements)


This add-on adds the following CTM features to

+ Andesite

+ Diorite

+ Granite

+ Smooth stone 

This includes stairs and slabs except smooth stone slabs they stay as normal

## NOTES


**THIS GO'S ABOVE CLASSIC IMPROVEMENTS AND THE FIRST ADD-ON ADD ON 3 CAN GO ABOVE OR BELOW THIS ADD ON!** 


**This works with Optifine and Continuity** The newest of version continuity has fixed the bug

## LINKS

**[OPTIFINE](https://optifine.net/downloads)**

**[CONTINUITY](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)**

Click the names to get linked to the pages
